name: Create Piano Keyboard Diagram
description: Create a labeled diagram of a one-octave piano keyboard in an ActivInspire flipchart. The diagram should feature a title 'Piano Keys' and correctly arranged white and black keys. Label the white keys 'C', 'D', 'E', 'F', 'G', 'A', and 'B' in their standard musical positions. Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/piano_keyboard.flipchart.

metadata.pattern_description: 7 white keys, 5 black keys in groups of 2 and 3
